name: OpenEvoShield: Dual Non-Stationary Continual Defense for Open-World Multi-Agent System Attacks
summary: arXiv:2607.19351v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems (LLM-MAS) are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, where adversaries inject malicious instructions th...
description: arXiv:2607.19351v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems (LLM-MAS) are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, where adversaries inject malicious instructions through inter-agent communication to propagate harmful behaviors. Unlike static threats, these attacks are doubly dynamic: adversaries refine injection strategies against deployed defenses while normal-...
author: Litian Zhang, Chaozhuo Li, Yuting Zhang, Zejian Chen, Bingyu Yan, Qiwei Ye
